content:
﻿.. _dp-BaseLookValue: CrDeviceProperty_BaseLookValue ============================== Get/Set the BaseLook value. CrDataType: `CrDataType_UInt16Array` .. raw:: html
Value Explanation
15-8bit Kind 16bit value that combines Kind(upper 8bit) and Index (lower 8bit)

Ex.)
0x0003 = 3(Preset)
0x0108 = 8(User)
It may increase or decrease because it varies depending on the model and setting status. See the :ref:`GetDisplayStringList` .. raw:: html for display character string.
CrBaseLookValue_Preset(0x00)
CrBaseLookValue_User(0x01)
CrBaseLookValue_Temporary(0x80)
CrBaseLookValue_Scene(0x02)
0-7bit Index
| It may increase or decrease because it varies depending on the model and setting status. | Refer to :ref:`GetDisplayStringList` for the display character. | If a BaseLook is extracted to the temporary space, the BaseLook index value including the temporary offset is added to the enumeration list. | If a BaseLook is removed from the temporary space, it is removed from the enumeration list. | The offset of Temporary is 0x8000. The next 4 bits are the offset of the Baselook used in Temporary. The lower 16 bits are the index of the Baselook. | For example, when you recall SceneFile Index1, the BaseLook Index of SceneFile Index1 is set to Temporary. | The Value is 0x8201 (Temporary offset 0x8000, BaseLook offset 0x0200, Index1 0x01). | Get the list of value with GetDisplayValueSize and GetDisplayValues.
